response.justification: Strong senior IC with broad full-stack and open-source experience, solid Linux/architecture exposure, and proven track record across many stacks including DLang, Node.js, and TypeScript. However, this is a senior/executive leadership role requiring formal team leadership experience and German at C1 minimum — the candidate self-reports only Basic German, which is a hard blocker for a client-facing Head of Development role in a German-speaking market. No explicit team-lead/management track record is shown either.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux background, including founding GISCollective and contributing to multiple OSS tools
Broad architectural experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput micro-services
Strong craftsmanship signal: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks, and mentoring activities
concerns: German listed as Basic — fails the C1 minimum requirement for client advisory work
No explicit formal leadership/management of an interdisciplinary team in prior roles
No UML or Python emphasis in the resume; Python not listed in skills

key_factors.factor: Lack of formal team leadership experience
